items.description: Content-Security-Policy uses nonce-based control — no unsafe-inline or unsafe-eval
Strict-Transport-Security with includeSubDomains and preload, max-age >= 1 year
X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff on all responses
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Permissions-Policy restricts camera, microphone, geolocation to self or none
No inline JavaScript or inline event handlers (onclick, onerror, etc.)
Subresource Integrity (SRI) on all third-party scripts and stylesheets
CSRF protection (SameSite cookies + CSRF tokens) on all state-changing endpoints
dangerouslySetInnerHTML absent or sanitized with proven HTML sanitizer
Session cookies have HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict flags
CORS origin allowlist reviewed — no wildcard on authenticated endpoints
Error messages reviewed — no stack traces, schema details, or enum leakage
No open redirect vulnerabilities — all redirects use allowlisted destinations
Clickjacking prevention verified in staging (X-Frame-Options + CSP frame-ancestors)
All CDN resources have SRI hashes verified and up-to-date
Authorization tokens not stored in localStorage — use HttpOnly cookies
Rate limiting configured on login, registration, and password-reset endpoints
SSRF protection on server-side HTTP calls — private IP ranges blocked
Frontend dependencies scanned for CVEs — no CRITICAL/HIGH unresolved
Threat model completed and reviewed for this web surface change
SAST scan passed with no CRITICAL findings
Secrets scan clean — no credentials or tokens in source code
Required security events logged — no PII, tokens, or secrets in logs
Security headers verified in staging environment with automated check
